name: oci-bassh
description: Agent workflows for SSH to OCI compute hosts through OCI Bastion sessions.

interface.shortDescription: SSH to OCI hosts through Bastion.
interface.longDescription: Portable agent workflows and a Go CLI for oci-context and bastion-session. This Codex plugin packages the generic skills so agents can track, ensure, diagnose, and connect to OCI compute hosts through OCI Bastion managed SSH sessions.
defaultPrompt: Connect to an OCI host through Bastion.
Check my OCI auth and bastion session health.
Track this compute host from Terraform outputs.
